topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said Sunday he believes there is a "good chance" of making a deal with Iran on Monday, ahead of his deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face heavy bombing.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Franklin D. Roosevelt: ‘The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today’
topStories.description: This powerful line by Franklin D. Roosevelt highlights a simple but profound idea: our fears and uncertainties in the present can prevent us from achieving a better future.

topStories.title: Middle East Conflict: US destroys two of its warplanes while rescuing pilot, Trump hails operation; Iran mocks
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday (local time) announced that an Air Force officer was rescued in an intense and daring nighttime operation. However, he did not mention that Washington had to destroy two of its warplanes to conduct the rescue operation. Iran has mocked Washington over the damage.

topStories.title: Inside The "Most Daring" Rescue Op In US History: What We Know, And Don't
topStories.description: The F-15E Strike Eagle was shot down over southwestern Iran on Friday, the first confirmed loss of a US combat aircraft inside Iran.

topStories.title: Trump issues stark warning to Iran: Reopen Strait of Hormuz or face US strikes on power plants and bridges on Tuesday
topStories.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said: “Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran… Open the Strait… or you’ll be living in Hell.”

topStories.title: Gunfire reported near Lafayette Park across from White House; US Secret Service launches probe
topStories.description: The US Secret Service said on Sunday (local time) that it is investigating reports of gunfire overnight near Lafayette Park, located just across the street from the White House, AP reported.

topStories.title: Kanye West's comeback tour announced in UK: PM Starmer expresses concern on rapper's history of antisemitic remarks
topStories.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has expressed concerns over US rapper Kanye West's upcoming performance in the country. This comes after the 48-year-old rapper has stoked several controversies in the past over his antisemitic remarks

topStories.title: Uttarakhand man flags adverse CIBIL score for years despite no loan or default; SC rescues him—here's what happened
topStories.description: The Supreme Court provided relief to Rajendra Singh Panwar, whose credit score was inaccurately negative due to confusion with others sharing his name. Banks clarified there were no defaults, resulting in the correction of his CIBIL score, allowing him better access to financial services.

topStories.title: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
topStories.description: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

topStories.title: US Rescues Missing Airman as Iran Strikes Persian Gulf States
topStories.description: US forces rescued an airman from Iran after his fighter jet was shot down, while the Islamic Republic’s continued attacks sparked fires that damaged Kuwait’s oil headquarters and shut down an Emirati petrochemicals plant.

topStories.title: Unlike BJP, Congress works to unify people and spread love: Rahul Gandhi
topStories.description: Rahul Gandhi accuses BJP and CM Sarma of corruption and spreading hatred, pledges Congress will unify Assam and deliver development.

dailyNews.description: Perez Hilton says a severe sepsis hospitalization led to a life-changing encounter with God, prompting him to read the Bible and apologize publicly.

dailyNews.title: Hungry peacock taps on windows for food, helps himself to fruit and peanuts in neighborhood homes
dailyNews.description: A stray peacock named Pete has apparently settled in on a quiet street, approaching homes and pecking at windows in search of food from charmed locals.

dailyNews.description: U.S. military rescued a seriously wounded F-15 crew member from deep inside Iran's mountains in what Trump called an amazing show of bravery and talent.

dailyNews.title: NHL fan goes into labor during Oilers game against Golden Knights, broadcaster says
dailyNews.description: An NHL fan went into labor and gave birth at Rogers Place during the Edmonton Oilers vs. Vegas Golden Knights game, according to a broadcaster.

dailyNews.title: Archaeologists uncover mysterious Christian artifact near waters tied to Jesus' ministry: 'No known parallel'
dailyNews.description: A one-of-a-kind artifact recently found near the Sea of Galilee may shed new light on how early Christians practiced baptism in the ancient city of Hippos.

dailyNews.title: Yankees legend Reggie Jackson criticizes Pete Hegseth's leadership amid Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Baseball Hall of Famer Reggie Jackson slammed Pete Hegseth on X over shaking up Army leadership during the ongoing military operation in Iran.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump praised the rescue of a downed U.S. airman in Iran as an “Easter Miracle," calling the mission one of the most daring operations in American military history.

dailyNews.title: Basketball legend Candace Parker takes aim at Geno Auriemma after Dawn Staley confrontation
dailyNews.description: Former WNBA star Candace Parker had no empathy for Geno Auriemma after his heated postgame confrontation with Dawn Staley at the women's Final Four on Friday night.

dailyNews.description: Donnie Wahlberg says date nights with Jenny McCarthy now mean watching "The Chosen" at home, skipping big plans for takeout and their faith-based show.

dailyNews.description: New research reveals five factors that may predict another stroke after a mini stroke, including hypertension, smoking and three specific stroke subtypes.

topStories.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
dailyNews.description: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Tim Kaine calls on Trump to 'dial back the rhetoric' after US jet is downed in Iran: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an interview with Meet the Press, Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) reacts to the latest developments in the war with Iran as the White House asks Congress to approve a major increase to the Pentagon budget.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Trump reacts to ‘Easter Miracle’ rescue of downed U.S. airman
dailyNews.description: In a text message to Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacts to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls rescue of F-15E airman an ‘Easter Miracle’
dailyNews.description: In a text message to “Meet the Press” moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacted to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump's $1.5 trillion military budget request faces uphill battle, Sen. Tim Kaine says
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism about the Trump administration's 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.
